title: corybas holttumii
intro: Corybas holttumii, also known as the slipper orchid, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Corybas holttumii is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
